title: Nedocromil Ophthalmic: MedlinePlus Drug Information
text:
Wash your hands to remove any medication. Other uses for this medicine 
This medication may be prescribed for other uses. Ask your doctor or pharmacist for more information.
What special precautions should I follow? 
Before using nedocromil eye drops, tell your doctor and pharmacist if you are allergic to nedocromil or any other medications. tell your doctor and pharmacist what prescription and nonprescription medications you are taking, including vitamins or herbal products. tell you doctor if you wear contact lenses; you should not wear contact lenses while your eyes are itchy and red due to allergies. What should I do if I forget a dose? 
Instill the missed dose as soon as you remember it. However, if it is almost time for the next dose, skip the missed dose and continue your regular dosing schedule. Do not instill a double dose to make up for a missed one.
What side effects can this medication cause? 
Nedocromil may cause side effects. Tell your doctor if any of these symptoms are severe or do not go away: 
stinging or burning of the eyes blurred vision increased eye redness or itching What should I know about storage and disposal of this medication? 
Keep this medication in the container it came in, tightly closed, and out of reach of children. Store it at room temperature and away from excess heat and moisture (not in the bathroom).
